$note: Labeled evaluation set for the CV scorer. Expected scores are BANDS [min,max] per dimension (0-20), not exact points — validate on within-band agreement, NOT point precision. Bands + criteria are grounded in docs/cv-scoring-methodology.md (Fresno State 4-level model; Columbia/MIT/Harvard criteria). Anchor CVs are seeded from verbatim weak/strong examples in those sources. Run via `pnpm eval:accuracy` (needs Gemini quota). This is an expert-criteria-grounded proxy, NOT human-rater ground truth.

cvs.rationale: Strong action verbs + quantified impact on most bullets; dated experience with scope; FE skills cover the rubric (HTML/CSS/JS/TS/React); degree + recent cert + side project.
cvs.parsed_text:
NGUYEN VAN A
Frontend Developer — Ho Chi Minh City
email: a.nguyen@example.com | github.com/anguyen

EXPERIENCE
Frontend Intern, TechCorp (06/2023 - 12/2023)
- Led redesign of the checkout flow in React + TypeScript, cutting page load time 40% for ~50,000 monthly users
- Built a reusable component library (20+ components) adopted by 3 product teams, reducing UI bug reports by 30%
- Implemented responsive, accessible (WCAG AA) layouts across 12 pages, raising Lighthouse accessibility from 72 to 96

PROJECTS
- ShopFast (personal): built a Next.js storefront with Tailwind + Jest tests (85% coverage), deployed on Vercel

SKILLS
React, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, Tailwind, Redux, Jest, Git, responsive design, accessibility

EDUCATION
B.Sc. Software Engineering, FPT University (2021 - 2025), GPA 3.6/4.0
Certificate: Meta Front-End Developer (2024)

cvs.rationale: Verbatim weak anchor: generic duty statements ('Responsible for…'), first-person paragraph, no dates, no metrics, sparse generic skills. Should land Beginning on action_verbs + experience.
